task_completion.description: Verify the requisition header has the correct Organization, Warehouse, and Price List.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Requisition window (Header tab), look for Organization set to 'HQ', Warehouse set to 'HQ Warehouse', and Price List set to 'Purchase'.

task_completion.description: Verify the requisition header has the correct dates and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Requisition window (Header tab), look for Document Date '07/15/2024' (or 2024-07-15), Date Required '08/01/2024' (or 2024-08-01), and Description 'Seasonal stock replenishment - Summer 2024'.

task_completion.description: Verify the first requisition line is created for Azalea Bush with the correct quantity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Requisition Line tab, look for a record with Product 'Azalea Bush' and Quantity '50'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second requisition line is created for Elm Tree with the correct quantity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Requisition Line tab, look for a record with Product 'Elm Tree' and Quantity '25'.

task_completion.description: Verify the requisition document has been processed to 'Completed' status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Requisition window, look for the Document Status field showing 'Completed' or 'CO'. The 'Document Action' button may also show 'Close' or be disabled, indicating it is already completed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the iDempiere web GUI to create the requisition.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the iDempiere web interface being actively used (menus, tabs, input fields) rather than API calls or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify no terminal or direct database manipulation was used.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows, psql prompts, or database management tools (like pgAdmin) should be visible inserting the requisition records.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction is with the genuine iDempiere ERP application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI should match standard iDempiere ERP layouts, including the GardenAdmin/GardenWorld login context at the top or bottom of the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The requisition must have the description 'Seasonal stock replenishment - Summer 2024'. The document status must be 'Completed' (represented as 'CO' in the database). The document date is 2024-07-15 (07/15/2024) and the required date is 2024-08-01 (08/01/2024). The requisition must contain two lines with real GardenWorld products: 'Azalea Bush' (quantity 50) and 'Elm Tree' (quantity 25).
